arts.ttl: Celtic kickstart clearout with major Alexandro Bernabei transfer profit as fee revealed while 4 more head for the exit
arts.sum: It's set to be a busy January for the Parkhead side as they get straight to work

arts.ttl: 'Never seen anything like it'... How Alistair Johnston has been left blown away by Celtic teammates
arts.sum: Johnston told The Herald, “I think this team does one of the best jobs I’ve ever seen of putting a previous result behind them, whether it’s positive or negative, and focusing on the next one. However, despite the success on the park Celtic have enjoyed under Rodgers, Johnston has been seriously impressed with how his teammates quickly put results behind them to focus on the next game.

arts.ttl: Jota and Kieran Tierney deals agreed as £40m man snapped up - Celtic's dream January window
arts.sum: There's been plenty of chatter surrounding potential Celtic signings and exits in the January transfer window, which is now open for Brendan Rodgers' squad to be tinkered with

Schmeichel has assumed number one duties since joining the club on a Bosman in the summer and conceded just four goals in the Scottish Premiership. Celtic head into Thursday's Old Firm derby 14 points clear at the division's summit with Rangers more concerned with Aberdeen in third as opposed to making a miraculous title tilt during the second half of the season.
CB: Leon King - The 20-year-old is in line for a rare start on the big occasion after Tavernier's injury. The midfielder scored in Rangers' Scottish League Cup final defeat in December.

arts.ttl: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers on his empathy with his Rangers rival Philippe Clement
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has admitted he has empathy with his Rangers counterpart Philippe Clement as he prepared to head to Ibrox.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers cites Rangers evidence that proves beating Celtic is what matters above all on the blue side of town
arts.sum: That won’t stop him from striving to stick another notch on the post when he arrives at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement claims Rangers fans are on his side as tensions mount ahead of Celtic clash
arts.sum: The Ibrox boss doesn’t believe supporters have lost their faith in him or his team as he makes investing in youth claim

arts.ttl: Celtic's 2024 in pictures as Brendan Rodgers writes more history for unstoppable Hoops
arts.sum: The Parkhead giants lost just two of their 50 games across all competitions in the calendar year

arts.ttl: Rangers' 2024 in pictures as Philippe Clement's men endure a year of false dawns but enjoy European highs
arts.sum: It's not been a year of glory for Philippe Clement's men, but there have been some eyecatching signings and European nights to remember
